title: trigger open
text: trigger open Interactive trigger that handles processing to open a tree node so that its subordinate items are shown in the list view of a Tree widget. Explain this code trigger open params string control : in ; TREE | LIST string item : in endparams ; <Your code here> end ; trigger open Copy Applies to: Form widgets: utree (Tree) Activation: Activated when the user double-clicks a tree or list item. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Parameters control —input control used by the user; one of: TREE —user clicked in the tree view. LIST —user clicked in the list view. item —value of the selected tree node. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
